title: EF Core Deep Dive
subtitle: Change tracker, N+1, migrations, and performance
description: EF Core is a black box until you understand the change tracker. Learn N+1 detection, split queries, compiled queries, and the interceptor pattern for production-grade data access.
learningOutcomes: Explain the change tracker and its first-level cache
Write and run safe production migrations
Profile EF Core queries with interceptors
